name: McDaniel for Congress
subject: On the Trail with Chris: Hyde-Smith’s hypocrisy, Memorial Day service
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Friends of Chris McDaniel
body:
Cindy Hyde-Smith didn’t take long to integrate herself into the Swamp. Despite claiming to support a balanced budget, Hyde-Smith recently voted against Senator Rand Paul’s “penny plan” which would have done exactly that. That is standard operating procedure for the Washington establishment: promising one thing but doing the exact opposite. | | | | [ ](https://mcdanielforsenate.cmail19.com/t/d-l-bgttid-ydllhlurty-r/)
---
Peter,
Cindy Hyde-Smith didn’t take long to integrate herself into the Swamp. Despite claiming to support a balanced budget, Hyde-Smith recently voted against Senator Rand Paul’s “penny plan” which would have done exactly that.
That is standard operating procedure for the Washington establishment: promising one thing but doing the exact opposite.
If I was in the Senate, I would have voted for that plan. Because unlike Cindy Hyde-Smith I do more than just give empty promises, I follow through with them.
I look forward to meeting more of you while I travel state and telling you how I will fight for Mississippi.
\- Chris
* * *
**On The Trail with Chris**
**PERRY COUNTY**
Chris had a great time speaking to some veterans in Perry County.
\---------------
**MEMORIAL DAY**
Chris was the keynote speaker at the Perry County Memorial Day service. It was an incredibly moving program.
\---------------
**BOYS STATE**
Chris spoke to the next generation of Mississippi men at Ole Miss! Big shoutout to Boys State and McDaniel City for the hospitality.
* * *
**ICYMI**

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
Another day, another broken promise from President Trump, friends.
During the campaign, Donald Trump promised over and over again not to cut Medicare, but his latest budget proposal does exactly that, eventually slashing _$236 billion_ from the program.
We cannot let Donald Trump and Republicans get away with this. I'm fighting back as hard as I can - for the sake of more than 57 million Americans who rely on Medicare to help pay for their ER visits, their chemotherapy, their lifesaving prescription drugs. But I can't do it alone.
**Will you be one of the 78 people I still need to add their names by midnight to demand that Donald Trump and the GOP stop threatening Medicare?**[Click here right now to add your name to tell the GOP: Leave Medicare alone!](https://secure.rosenfornevada. Thank you,
Jacky

name: Team Kasich
subject: The Latest
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich
body:
It was a busy week - full of good policy discussions and
interviews to draw attention to some of the critical issues that
are being lost in the mess of DC politics.

Peter - It was a busy week -
full of good policy discussions and interviews to draw attention
to some of the critical issues that are being lost in the mess of
DC politics.

DACA/Dreamers

Gov. John Kasich authored an
op-ed in the USA Today about why a DACA fix should be a slam dunk
for both sides of the aisle in Congress. Read more here.

The governor has also been a
vocal advocate for the discharge petition being circulated by GOP
House members to force a vote on a compassionate and conservative
fix for our Dreamers. Gov. Kasich is proud to stand with leaders
like Reps. Carlos Curbelo and Will Hurd.

North Korea

Gov. Kasich spoke about the
stakes of diplomatic discussions with North Korea:

National Debt

Gov. Kasich authored a column in
the Wall Street Journal about how our growing debt and
unsustainable entitlement spending is bankrupting America and
threatens both our economy and national security.

The governor also spoke about
this on CNN this past week:

Tariffs

Gov. Kasich was a guest on
Bloomberg TV and CNN, where he spoke about how President Trump's
decision to impose damaging tariffs on some of our closest allies
will have a lasting impact on how the world looks to America for
leadership.

Thank You!

We would like to extend a special
thank you for those who donated to help hit our May fundraising
goal!
If you haven't had a chance to
give and want to support Gov. John Kasich & these important
messages, please visit: JohnKasich.com/Donate
Thanks for all that you're doing!
-Team Kasich

committee.

name: Mike
subject: protecting our jobs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
We need your help to inform and mobilize Hoosiers across the state so every voter knows that Joe will always put workers first. |
---

| | Peter:

Yesterday, we launched Labor for Joe.

Joe knows that working families are the backbone of Indiana. He knows those who leave in the dark and come home in the dark to build a better life for themselves deserve a representative who will protect their jobs and livelihoods. **That 's why he's always had their backs. Now, we need to have his.**

This is a tough race, and in order to win, we must build coalitions in every corner of the state to support Joe.

**If you 're a Hoosier worker, will you join our newest coalition, Labor for Joe? >>** | **********[**YES, COUNT ME IN!**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c21d5/7377f838/3c029d02/51f909e9/3358496347/VEsH/ "https://donnelly.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/join-labor-for-joe")**********
---

---
Joe has stood with working families through thick and thin. Throughout his time in the Senate, he's pushed for policies that will help prepare Hoosiers for the jobs of the 21st century, he's fought against trade deals that leave Hoosiers out, and when corporations like Carrier and Rexnord outsourced jobs, he introduced the End Outsourcing Jobs Act to protect them in the future.

We need your help to inform and mobilize Hoosiers across the state so every voter knows that Joe will always put workers first. [**Join Labor for Joe today. >>**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c21d5/7377f838/3c029d02/51f909e9/3358496347/VEsE/ "https://donnelly.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/join-labor-for-joe")

Mike Lindburg

body:

We know why the GOP is going all in to save its Senate majority, friends:
**The future of the Supreme Court is on the line this November.**
Nevada Senator Dean Heller was caught on tape behind closed doors saying he expects a Supreme Court vacancy this summer that will energize the GOP - **and with the GOP**** _desperate_ to appoint another ultraconservative justice, Trump and McConnell are going ALL IN.**

**Nate Silver's _FiveThirtyEight_**** says Nevada's Senate race could decide the majority, so the future of the Supreme Court hinges on what we do here.**

name: Team Casey
subject: volunteer to make PA blue in 2018!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e676e/51dbcc2a/74293aa/3a2e806/1185360145/VEsH/ "http://www.bobcasey.com/")

Team: It's already June -- can you believe it?

Here at Casey Campaign HQ, we are busy kicking it into high gear for the general election in November. Our office keeps growing, and it feels like we will never have enough furniture for all of the new staff coming on board.

Everyone on our team is excited and ready to elect Democrats up and down the ticket, starting with Bob Casey at the top. We don't need to tell you how important it is that we keep Pennsylvania's Senate seat blue this year, and volunteers like you are going to make that happen.

Each phone call, email, text message and tweet is important to make sure all Pennsylvanians hear our message this year, and we are always looking for more help spreading Bob's message and getting out the vote. Do you have spare time you can donate to the campaign? It doesn't have to take your whole day -- even 5 minutes can make a huge difference, and there are so many different ways to help. You can:

**Volunteer in person**
_Of course, knocking on doors, working rallies and picking up the phone are some of the most important ways volunteers help campaigns like ours._
[SIGN UP](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e676e/51dbcc2a/74293aa/3a2e807/1185360145/VEsE/ "https://secure.bobcasey.com/volunteer-in-pa?refcode=em_20180603_vol_rem&source=em_20180603_vol_rem")

**Do virtual volunteering**
_We're getting ready to host virtual volunteer events -- like remote text and phone banks. Sign up to be the first to hear when we need online volunteers._
[SIGN UP](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e676e/51dbcc2a/74293aa/3a2e800/1185360145/VEsF/ "https://secure.bobcasey.com/volunteer-virtually?refcode=em_20180603_vol_rem&source=em_20180603_vol_rem")

**Volunteer your social media**
_Studies have shown that YOU are the best messenger for convincing your friends to vote. By volunteering to share, retweet and post our messages, you help make sure that every Pennsylvania voter knows where Bob stands._
[SIGN UP](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e676e/51dbcc2a/74293aa/3a2e801/1185360145/VEsC/ "https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/s/sign-up-to-share-bob-casey-s-message-on-social-media?refcode=em_20180603_vol_rem&source=em_20180603_vol_rem")

Looking forward to having you on the team!

Team Casey

body:
Arizonans from each of the 11 counties in our district signed the petition to get me on the ballot to run for re-election.
[](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633990/1a8421e1/1a47c4474/4b591ce2/1094657586/VEsH/ "http://www.tomohalleran.com")
---
Friend, Last week, we filed the final ballot signatures from supporters across AZ-01. More than 3,500 Arizonans from each of the 11 counties in our district signed the petition to get me on the ballot to run for re-election. I couldn't be more grateful to each and every one of them. [**Now that we 're officially on the ballot, it's time to win -- and we've got a lot of work ahead of us in this race. Will you chip in $10 today so my campaign can get started?**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq22018?refcode=em_ty_2018.06.03_b1_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") [](http://action.tomohalleran. Signature gathering is a long, tedious process, and it's a huge team effort. We couldn't have done it without you, so I want to thank you for your support over the last few months. **And thanks to your support, we surpassed our May online fundraising goal last week too -- another critical hurdle for our campaign.** Thanks to you, we're heading into the summer with some pretty tremendous momentum, and with your support, I'm going to continue fighting for Arizona families in Washington. [**I've been named the most endangered House Democrat, so this race is going to be competitive all the way through November. It would mean a lot if you 'd consider kick starting our summer fundraising efforts with a donation of any size today.**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq22018?refcode=em_ty_2018.06.03_b1_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Yours, Tom | ****[DONATE](http://action.tomohalleran. **_**Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. name: Mitch the Intern
subject: A peek into our Ames office today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
Peter,
Hey there.
My name is Mitch Kerr, or as Team Scholten likes to call me, "Mitch the Intern."
Over the last 3 months, I've spent countless hours volunteering and reaching out to people to tell them about J.D. Scholten and his campaign to beat Steve King. The collage of pictures above were all taken in our Ames office today. (That's me in the green shirt, middle row, on the right.) **Today I personally made 211 phone calls to voters,** regaining the title of "_favorite intern_ ," a term of endearment that I've been given—and had taken away—on many occasions.
We do have a lot of fun in this office, but we're also putting in the hard work it takes to win this election for J.D. I've met J.D. many times, and I've even taken a ride in "Sioux City Sue." I'm supporting J.D. for many reasons, but I started doing this because I'm a big supporter of equal rights and I know J.D. will be a huge improvement in that area over Steve King.
But here's the thing...
**We have 34 hour until polls open on Election Day,** and we really need your help. **Every phone call made and every door knocked for J.D will make a difference in this race!**
* **_[Click HERE to sign up for a shift in our office in Sioux City or Ames.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1334453/7308025/790893845?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2I5YzZhZi05YzY3LWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDE1NWRjMzM3YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DSNGBcnI4WPIcokUc5eBNC0EfT25yPg547dbuzAt5mU=)_**

* [**_If you’re out of the area, and want to make calls using our virtual phone bank, click HERE._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1334454/7308026/1202102897?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2I5YzZhZi05YzY3LWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDE1NWRjMzM3YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DSNGBcnI4WPIcokUc5eBNC0EfT25yPg547dbuzAt5mU=)

name: Jason Sydoriak
subject: Fwd: we need help now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bateson for Congress
body:
Hi Peter,
Wanted to make sure you saw this email from Emma. Our field organizers have been working like crazy to reach last-minute undecided voters this weekend, and they could really use your help. Even a small donation could have a HUGE impact in helping spread Regina’s message and changing minds on the ground.
We are in the homestretch, and all the momentum is in our direction. We just need to reach our pre-primary fundraising goal ($3,540 to go) and talk to every last voter we can.
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb_primary?refcode=RB_EM_FR_180603_3_5&amount=25&recurring=auto [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb_primary?refcode=RB_EM_FR_180603_3_5&amount=25&recurring=auto]
Thanks,
-JS
Begin Forwarded Message: Jason,
I know you’ve been getting a lot of emails. I know it’s a weekend and you’re probably relaxing. But it is critical that we work around the clock to make sure Tom McClintock is retired this year!
Polls and pundits agree that Regina is the only candidate who can give Tom a run for his money. Her ability to WIN in November is why she’s gotten three major newspaper endorsements.
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb_primary?refcode=RB_EM_FR_180603_3_5&amount=25&recurring=auto [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb_primary?refcode=RB_EM_FR_180603_3_5&amount=25&recurring=auto]
We are two days away from the primary, and the race is still too close to call. We are knocking on every door, calling every phone number, and distributing literature like crazy. But we need help. Now.
Can you help Regina win her primary?
Grassroots donations make the difference in electing Democrats. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.
Donate $7 now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb_primary?express_lane=true&&refcode=RB_EM_FR_180603_3_5&&amount=7.00]
Donate $25 now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb_primary?express_lane=true&refcode=RB_EM_FR_180603_3_5&amount=25.00]
Donate $50 now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb_primary?express_lane=true&refcode=RB_EM_FR_180603_3_5&amount=50.00]
Donate $100 now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb_primary?express_lane=true&refcode=RB_EM_FR_180603_3_5&amount=100.00]
Other amount [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb_primary?refcode=RB_EM_FR_180603_3_5&amount=25&recurring=auto]
This race is going to be decided by what we can accomplish in the next 48 hours. We are still $5,670 short of our goal. Reaching that goal is the key to reaching all the voters whom we need to show up for #TeamBateson.
Will you commit to giving right now so that Regina can win this primary and our movement can win in November? Our movement has achieved so much -- now we just need to get over the finish line.
In friendship,
Emma
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP01/1/62063/images/Regina%20Bateson%20for%20Congress%20logo.png]Regina is running for Congress in California’s highly competitive 4th Congressional District.
Help spread the word! Forward this email to 5 friends to help Regina’s grassroots campaign grow.
Regina can’t win this race without support from people like you. Join her people-powered movement by contributing here. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-footer?&amount=25.00&recurring=true]
You can also get involved by following Regina on Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/bateson2018/] and Twitter. [https://twitter.com/bateson2018?lang=en] If you’d like to unsubscribe from our list, click below.
Checks may be made payable to: Bateson for Congress, PO BOX 1130 Roseville, CA, 95678
